title: Human capital stocks estimates in the UK: 2004 to 2024
summary: Human Capital Stocks Estimates for years between 2004 and 2024. Includes full and employed human capital for national estimates for each year.

title: UK trade in services by partner country: October to December 2025
summary: Trade in services data, including a breakdown of exports and imports by country and geographical region, EU and non-EU. Official statistics in development.

title: UK trade, quarterly goods and services: October to December 2025
summary: Quarterly estimates of total trade, trade in goods, and trade in services by country.

title: Business demography, quarterly, UK: January to March 2026
summary: Official statistics in development on business births and deaths from the Inter-Departmental Business Register with high-level breakdowns by industry and region.

title: Retail Sales, Great Britain: March 2026 time series
summary: A first estimate of retail sales in volume and value terms, seasonally and non-seasonally adjusted.

title: Retail Sales, Great Britain: March 2026
summary: A first estimate of retail sales in volume and value terms, seasonally and non-seasonally adjusted.

title: International migration research, progress update: April 2026
summary: An update on international migration methods and research to further develop admin-based migration estimates (ABMEs).

title: Economic activity and social change in the UK, real-time indicators: 23 April 2026
summary: Early experimental data and analysis on economic activity and social change in the UK. These real-time indicators are created using rapid response surveys, novel data sources and experimental methods.

title: Business insights and impact on the UK economy: 23 April 2026
summary: The impact of challenges facing the economy and other events on UK businesses, including financial performance, workforce, trade, and business resilience.

title: Experiences of NHS healthcare services in England: 23 April 2026
summary: Patient experiences of accessing healthcare from the ONS Health Insight Survey, funded by NHS England. These are official statistics in development.
